# ‎Comet - AI Browser & Assistant App - App Store for iPhone * [iPhone](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/today) * [iPad](https://apps.apple.com/us/ipad/today) * [Mac](https://apps.apple.com/us/mac/discover) * [Vision](https://apps.apple.com/us/vision/apps-and-games) * [Watch](https://apps.apple.com/us/watch/apps-and-games) * [TV](https://apps.apple.com/us/tv/discover) Search * [Today](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/today) * [Games](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/games) * [Apps](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/apps) * [Arcade](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/arcade) ### Platform * [iPhone](https://apps.apple.com/us/iphone/today) * [iPad](https://apps.apple.com/us/ipad/today) * [Mac](https://apps.apple.com/us/mac/discover) * [Vision](https://apps.apple.com/us/vision/apps-and-games) * [Watch](https://apps.apple.com/us/watch/apps-and-games) * [TV](https://apps.apple.com/us/tv/discover) ![Image 1](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) ![Image 2](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) # Comet - AI Browser & Assistant ## Browser and AI assistant Free · In‑App Purchases Share * [1.7K Ratings 4.8 5.](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/comet-ai-browser-assistant/id6748622471#productRatings) * [Ages 18+Years](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/comet-ai-browser-assistant/id6748622471#information) * [Category ![Image 3](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) Utilities](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/comet-ai-browser-assistant/id6748622471#information) * [Developer Perplexity AI, Inc.](https://apps.apple.com/us/developer/perplexity-ai-inc/id1668000336) * [Language EN+ 46 More](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/comet-ai-browser-assistant/id6748622471#information) * [Size 275.4 MB](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/comet-ai-browser-assistant/id6748622471#information) * * ![Image 4](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) * ![Image 5](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) * ![Image 6](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) * ![Image 7](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) * ![Image 8](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) iPhone, iPad Comet is an AI-powered browser that acts as a personal assistant and thinking partner. Boost your focus, streamline your workflow, and turn curiosity into momentum. · Unified AI search, instant context, and automation across every site. Summarize, shop, schedule, and research—directly in the browser. · Enjoy the web and let the AI assistant handle your chores · Do everything on your to-do list faster with Comet · Comet adapts to how you think and work, learning your habits to keep you organized. Never lose track of tabs or inspiration. Terms of Service: https://www.perplexity.ai/tos Privacy Policy: https://www.perplexity.ai/privacy more ## Events * …[![Image 9](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif) #### MAJOR UPDATE ### Introducing Comet The browser that works for you. Available on iOS.](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/comet-ai-browser-assistant/id6748622471?eventid=6760384089) [## Ratings & Reviews](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/6748622471?see-all=reviews&platform=iphone) * 4.8 out of 5 1.7K Ratings * ### Beyond a Browser: So Good It Feels Like Magic 2d ago mbthebulldog Comet has very quickly become the browser I actually want to live in every day. I use it both at work (healthcare/IT and operations) and at home, and it has already replaced a bunch of tools I used to juggle.Instead of bouncing between a traditional browser, an AI chatbot, and my notes, I can stay in one place and let Comet do the tab wrangling and research for me. It is fantastic for deep dives where I have lots of sources open: I can have the assistant summarize pages, compare vendors, pull out key details from documentation, or draft messages and policies based on what I am looking at, all inside the browser.On iOS, it is exactly what I wanted: the same intelligence I have on my Mac, now in my pocket. Being able to quickly ask questions about a page I am viewing, summarize long articles when I am on the go, or talk through ideas with the assistant has made my iPhone feel like a much more powerful work device. It is also great for personal stuff like trip planning, product research, and all the random curiosity rabbit holes I fall into.I love that Comet feels like a thoughtful, modern browser first, with AI woven in where it genuinely saves time instead of getting in the way. The design is clean, the assistant is fast, and it is clear the team is building toward a serious agentic future of browsing.There are still a few early rough edges (like sync on iOS occasionally acting up), but none of them outweigh how much time I am saving and how much smoother my workflows feel. For anyone who lives in their browser and does a lot of research, writing, or decision making, Comet is absolutely worth trying. # Beyond a Browser: So Good It Feels Like Magic 2d ago mbthebulldog Comet has very quickly become the browser I actually want to live in every day. I use it both at work
